misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: magazine front matter with volume/issue information, table of contents for October 1921 issue, General Board member listings, and various advertisements for LDS garments, burial clothes, books, tailoring services, and other products. There is also a partial continuation of the Relief Society Nurse Class graduation article that appears to be already extracted as a standalone file. No complete standalone articles, poems, or editorials are present that haven't already been extracted.
